apis.name: animateTo
apis.purpose: 显式动画 — 在闭包中改变状态变量时自动插入过渡动效

apis.name: transition
apis.purpose: 组件内转场 — 组件插入/删除时的过渡动效

apis.name: animation (属性动画)
apis.purpose: 属性动画 — 组件属性变化时自动产生渐变过渡

apis.name: keyframeAnimateTo
apis.purpose: 关键帧动画 — 指定若干关键帧状态实现分段动画

apis.name: TapGesture
apis.purpose: 点击手势 — 支持单击、双击和多次点击事件识别

apis.name: LongPressGesture
apis.purpose: 长按手势 — 触发长按手势事件

apis.name: PanGesture
apis.purpose: 滑动手势 — 滑动距离达到设定值时触发

apis.name: PinchGesture
apis.purpose: 捏合手势 — 多指捏合缩放操作

apis.name: GestureGroup
apis.purpose: 手势组合 — 顺序/并发/互斥模式的手势识别组

apis.name: onClick
apis.purpose: 点击事件 — 组件被点击时触发回调

apis.name: onTouch
apis.purpose: 触摸事件 — 手指触摸动作（按下/滑动/抬起）触发回调

notableFindings: animateTo (global) is deprecated from API 18 — always use this.getUIContext()?.animateTo() instead
keyframeAnimateTo is a UIContext instance method (API 11+), not a global function — requires UIContext instance via this.getUIContext()
TransitionOptions (old transition API) deprecated from API 10 — use TransitionEffect API instead
animation component attribute only applies to properties declared BEFORE it in the builder chain
onClick/onTouch are universal component events, not gesture recognizers — use .gesture() only for GestureType objects
